programme.title: Deadly Dispatch
programme.desc: After her best friend IS tragically murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong, Tiffany Jackson takes justice in her own hands to find his killer.

programme.title: Safe Room
programme.desc: After Ian accidentally witnesses a break-in in the house across the street and records the horrific murder of the homeowner, Lila becomes embroiled in a deadly struggle to protect her son.

programme.title: When Love Kills: The Falicia Blakely Story
programme.desc: All Falicia ever wanted was a better life and she found it with Dino. He promised her the world and all she had to do for it was to kill.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When an Atlanta rapper on the verge of stardom is shot dead, evidence on the scene seems to point to a straightforward case of self-defense. But is everything as it seems? Soon detectives will find the rapper’s final recording, which reveals the shocking truth behind the horrific events leading to his death.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: After a brilliant, beautiful college student goes missing, the case takes one shocking turn after another. Soon detectives are investigating a scandalous alleged affair with a pastor, but will it be the affair itself or the jealousy it caused that will lead detectives to her killer

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: After years of putting others first, a caring woman finds new love in an unlikely place. Then one day she disappears, and rumors begin circulating. But as everything unravels, a shocking claim is offered up, which turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Chicwanda Forbes/Carter Carol Cervantez
programme.desc: Chicwanda Forbes has worked hard to make a life for herself in New Orleans, until an older man offers her the attention she craves in exchange for her loyalty. And in Fort Worth, career-driven Carter Carol Cervantez begins to rethink her priorities when she finds love at the workplace.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Dorthia Bynum/Lillian Roberts
programme.desc: Following a tumultuous childhood, Dorthia Bynum is looking for someone to heal her emotional scars. So when she finds a boy who cures what ails her, she�ll stop at nothing to ensure her place in his heart. And in Michigan, when a couple holds a young boy hostage, it leads them all on a terrifying journey from which there�s no return.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Sandra Holling/Briana Hood
programme.desc: In Ohio, Sandra Holling has always fallen for the wrong type of man. When she falls for the ultimate bad boy, her love pushes her to join him in his deadly fantasies. In Athens, Georgia, Briana Hood truly believes she has married the love of her life. But when her perfect man shows his true colors, her devotion to her husband takes her on a dangerous road.

programme.title: A Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: With help from a handsome investigator, a brilliant sculptor unravels the twisted truth behind her missing newborn baby.

programme.title: Deadly Dispatch
programme.desc: After her best friend IS tragically murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong, Tiffany Jackson takes justice in her own hands to find his killer.

programme.title: Safe Room
programme.desc: After Ian accidentally witnesses a break-in in the house across the street and records the horrific murder of the homeowner, Lila becomes embroiled in a deadly struggle to protect her son.

programme.title: When Love Kills: The Falicia Blakely Story
programme.desc: All Falicia ever wanted was a better life and she found it with Dino. He promised her the world and all she had to do for it was to kill.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When an Atlanta rapper on the verge of stardom is shot dead, evidence on the scene seems to point to a straightforward case of self-defense. But is everything as it seems? Soon detectives will find the rapper’s final recording, which reveals the shocking truth behind the horrific events leading to his death.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: After a brilliant, beautiful college student goes missing, the case takes one shocking turn after another. Soon detectives are investigating a scandalous alleged affair with a pastor, but will it be the affair itself or the jealousy it caused that will lead detectives to her killer

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - The Blade of a Broken Heart
programme.desc: A young father who was excited to watch his sons grow up is fatally stabbed on Thanksgiving weekend. When detectives uncover a love triangle, they question the motive behind his murder and find a killer determined to have their pie... and eat it too.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Ciera Johnson/Krystal Riordan
programme.desc: Ciera Johnson has been living a righteous life in Cleveland. But when her boyfriend questions her loyalty, she goes to extremes to prove her love.Krystal Riordan goes from rags to riches when she is adopted by a loving family. But her fairytale becomes a nightmare when she begins dating a pimp in NYC.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Leslie Gordon/Erica Sheppard
programme.desc: Leslie Gordon hopes that a vacation with her man will bring them closer together. But when he lets her in on a devilish plan, her getaway turns into a nightmare. Later, Erica Sheppard runs away from an abusive relationship with her ex. When a friend asks for a favor, her fresh start quickly fades to black.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Teen mom Ashley Owens struggles to make ends meet in Charlotte, North Carolina until she falls for a bad boy with a plan for some easy cash. In Illinois, Nicole Eason dreams of giving her husband a loving family. When her own babies are taken away, she�ll use deception and deceit to fill their home with kids.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Baited by Love
programme.desc: In a whirlwind romance, a beautiful college student falls under the spell of a local bad boy. He enourages her to help him with his criminal activities, and out of love she agrees. But when the two find themselves in an intense moment of danger, she quickly throws her morals away to protect her man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Young and Na�ve
programme.desc: When a teenage girl meets a handsome, charming older man, she feels like everything in her life is falling into place. But soon, a gruesome discovery related to the disappearance of a local woman will reveal a darker side to this love story. Before long, police are on the trail of a teen who would go to any lengths to be with her man.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Horror Beneath the Ashes
programme.desc: A community is rocked when a mom, her children, and their neighbor are brutally murdered. As detectives try to uncover who would commit such a heinous quadruple homicide, their investigation leads to an undeniable clue pointing to the killer.
